title: Horizontal scrolling in table view
excerpt: Hello monday community and developers, I have made several unintentional errors due to the fact that when I try to scroll from left to right from the bottom scroll bar I move the position of the items due to the natural …

posts.author: gestionbiblioteca (David Camelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello monday community and developers, I have made several unintentional errors due to the fact that when I try to scroll from left to right from the bottom scroll bar I move the position of the items due to the natural movement of the hand diagonally. The red arrow indicates the cursor movement.

image1841×941 194 KB

image1841×941 204 KB

I suggest that the bottom bar be wider and with a box or white space that separates the elements of the board to avoid making the same mistake.

Thanks.
